testcase.name: home renders core UI and version report link

failure.message: smoke.spec.ts:16:1 home renders core UI and version report link

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › smoke.spec.ts:16:1 › home renders core UI and version report link ───────────────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByRole('heading', { name: /Glass Room/i }) Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByRole('heading', { name: /Glass Room/i })
17 | await gotoApp(page, "/"); 18 | > 19 | await expect(page.getByRole("heading", { name: /Glass Room/i })).toBeVisible(); | ^ 20 | await enterRoom(page); 21 | 22 | const versionLink = page.locator('a[title*="Open test report for"]').first(); at /home/runner/work/glassroom/glassroom/playwright/smoke.spec.ts:19:68

testcase.name: vitest junit artifact is reachable

failure.message: smoke.spec.ts:78:1 vitest junit artifact is reachable

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › smoke.spec.ts:78:1 › vitest junit artifact is reachable ─────────────────────────────
Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed
Locator: locator('body') Timeout: 5000ms - Expected substring - 1 + Received string + 8
- testsuites + + Error response + Error code: 404 + Message: File not found. + Error code explanation: 404 - Nothing matches the given URI. + + +
Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('body') 9 × locator resolved to <body>…</body> - unexpected value " Error response Error code: 404 Message: File not found. Error code explanation: 404 - Nothing matches the given URI.
"
78 | test("vitest junit artifact is reachable", async ({ page }) => { 79 | await gotoApp(page, "/reports/vitest-results.xml"); > 80 | await expect(page.locator("body")).toContainText("testsuites"); | ^ 81 | }); 82 | at /home/runner/work/glassroom/glassroom/playwright/smoke.spec.ts:80:38
